metadata.title:
LETTERS TITLE GOOD.

Earl Day Claims in Kittitas County
Defended by the Supreme


Court.

pages.raw_text:
WASHINGTON, Jan. 27.--A decis-
ion affecting the Northern Pacific land
grant was rendered by the supreme
court yesterday. In 1881 Peter and
Henry Nelson located upon unsurvey-
ed land in the grant in which was
then the territory OF Washington.
The railroad company had at the
time filed map showing the propos-
ed line, but not one showing the final
location.


The opinion was handed down by
Justice Harlan. 1t was held that the
settlers title was better than that of
the company until the map was filed.
as up to that time congress had con-
troll of the lands.


The land in question is located in
Kittitas county.
